name: Local Leads Launchpad
headline: A lead-generation website system for local service businesses
idealFor: Roofers, med spas, home services, legal, and local operators
description: A revenue-focused site package with quote capture, proof sections, and mobile-first calls to action designed for high-intent local traffic.
deliveryCopy: Source pack includes landing page structure, lead form content, and call-first CTA sections.
bullets: Built for search, calls, and quote requests
Trust blocks, reviews, and service-area layout included
Designed to turn paid and organic traffic into leads

sections.title: Lead capture first
sections.description: This pack prioritizes contact forms, calls, and service-area trust instead of generic brochure content.

sections.title: Local SEO structure
sections.description: The page layout supports service pages, proof, and FAQ blocks that can expand into location-driven content.

sections.title: Mobile conversion
sections.description: Tap targets, contact rows, and form hierarchy are built around users who are ready to act from their phone.

media.title: A local business site package with stronger conversion structure
media.body: Use it to sell a fast website build for service businesses that need leads more than brand theatre.
